_comment: Shared graph-order parity fixture (issue #198). Seeded from the ralphy-core golden `in_graph_resolves_the_bioledger_chain`. `issues` is the FULL open graph (queue members + the open out-of-queue bridge nodes the chain walks through); `expectedOrder` is the queue in `sort_queue_in_graph` order. The Rust parity test (crates/ralphy-core/src/blocked.rs::board_order_matches_shared_fixture) derives the queue as the issues named in `expectedOrder`, the open set as all `issues`, and asserts the sort yields `expectedOrder` verbatim. The JS `orderGraph` port (crates/ralphy-daemon/assets/ui/wb-kanban.js) is cross-checked against the same file by re-read (no JS harness).
